science_subject.phenomenon: How we picture electric and magnetic fields
science_subject.key_measurement: MMS mission multipoint sampling of Earth's magnetosphere (NASA, 2014)
science_subject.visualization_prompt: Scientific physics visualization: smooth magnetic field lines around Earth magnetosphere context with MMS spacecraft scale reference, clinical grade, illustrative field topology, no monopole artifacts

sources.citation: NASA MMS mission — Magnetospheric Multiscale observatories at Naval Research Laboratory (2014)
Griffiths D.J., Introduction to Electrodynamics, 4th ed. (Pearson, 2013)

science_subject.illustrative_note: EM field / magnetosphere @2 — four MMS spacecraft represent multipoint field sampling. Avoid: disconnected random curves, monopole fields, field lines crossing.

config.voice_suffix: clear enthusiastic science communicator voice, precise but accessible diction, synthetic presenter only

shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @Julian-001: identical presenter face, smart-casual wardrobe, seamless neutral set, same eye-line to camera — seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut. CONTINUITY LOCK @Set-Seamless-Neutral-001: identical neutral grey seamless — same backdrop tone mid-grey #9A9A98, same floor sweep, same subject-to-backdrop distance, same falloff — seamless continuation, zero jump cut. STYLE LOCK @Style-Cool-Clinical-001: cool-clinical grade — neutral white balance, low saturation, accurate color reproduction, minimal stylistic grading, science and product trust, no warm cozy cast, no film grain. Presenter addresses camera on seamless neutral, crisp science hook. Camera: locked medium, direct address. Neutral seamless 5500K bilateral soft key locked — symmetrical wrap, subtle nose shadow only, zero hue drift, no magenta vignette, no warm/cool lateral split. Neutral 5600–6500K even field — shadow definition for shape only, no gel, no warm practicals in frame. COLOR LOCK Seamless-Neutral: backdrop #9A9A98±2%, skin true-to-life, wardrobe colors accurate, no gel spill — no magenta edge gradient, no orange spotlight cone. GRADE LOCK Cool-Clinical: grey axis neutral, skin neither pink nor yellow pushed, saturation -15% global — forbid magenta tint, forbid orange warmth, forbid teal skin on shadows, forbid vintage fade. Locked-off or slow linear track; no handheld. Lip-synced, delivers: "You cannot see a magnetic field — but you can map it. Field lines are our honest sketch of which way a compass needle would point, smoothly, everywhere in space." clear enthusiastic science communicator voice, precise but accessible diction, synthetic presenter only. Finish on presentational gesture peak, never hold dead stillness or dead frame.
shots.speech_text: You cannot see a magnetic field — but you can map it. Field lines are our honest sketch of which way a compass needle would point, smoothly, everywhere in space.

shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @Julian-001: identical presenter face, smart-casual wardrobe, seamless neutral set, same eye-line to camera — seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut. CONTINUITY LOCK @Set-Seamless-Neutral-001: identical neutral grey seamless — same backdrop tone mid-grey #9A9A98, same floor sweep, same subject-to-backdrop distance, same falloff — seamless continuation, zero jump cut. STYLE LOCK @Style-Cool-Clinical-001: cool-clinical grade — neutral white balance, low saturation, accurate color reproduction, minimal stylistic grading, science and product trust, no warm cozy cast, no film grain. Presenter explains the phenomenon plainly, motivated gesture, clinical lighting. Camera: slow push-in medium. Neutral seamless 5500K bilateral soft key locked — symmetrical wrap, subtle nose shadow only, zero hue drift, no magenta vignette, no warm/cool lateral split. Neutral 5600–6500K even field — shadow definition for shape only, no gel, no warm practicals in frame. COLOR LOCK Seamless-Neutral: backdrop #9A9A98±2%, skin true-to-life, wardrobe colors accurate, no gel spill — no magenta edge gradient, no orange spotlight cone. GRADE LOCK Cool-Clinical: grey axis neutral, skin neither pink nor yellow pushed, saturation -15% global — forbid magenta tint, forbid orange warmth, forbid teal skin on shadows, forbid vintage fade. Locked-off or slow linear track; no handheld. Lip-synced, delivers: "Electric and magnetic fields assign a force direction to every point. We draw lines tangent to that direction — denser where the field is stronger, never crossing because direction would be ambiguous." clear enthusiastic science communicator voice, precise but accessible diction, synthetic presenter only. Finish on presentational gesture peak, never hold dead stillness or dead frame.
shots.speech_text: Electric and magnetic fields assign a force direction to every point. We draw lines tangent to that direction — denser where the field is stronger, never crossing because direction would be ambiguous.

CONTINUITY LOCK @Set-Seamless-Neutral-001: identical neutral grey seamless — same backdrop tone mid-grey #9A9A98, same floor sweep, same subject-to-backdrop distance, same falloff — seamless continuation, zero jump cut. STYLE LOCK @Style-Cool-Clinical-001: cool-clinical grade — neutral white balance, low saturation, accurate color reproduction, minimal stylistic grading, science and product trust, no warm cozy cast, no film grain. Presenter cites measurement, experiment, or observation chain — evidence-forward tone. Camera: medium — gesture to evidence. Neutral seamless 5500K bilateral soft key locked — symmetrical wrap, subtle nose shadow only, zero hue drift, no magenta vignette, no warm/cool lateral split. Neutral 5600–6500K even field — shadow definition for shape only, no gel, no warm practicals in frame. COLOR LOCK Seamless-Neutral: backdrop #9A9A98±2%, skin true-to-life, wardrobe colors accurate, no gel spill — no magenta edge gradient, no orange spotlight cone. GRADE LOCK Cool-Clinical: grey axis neutral, skin neither pink nor yellow pushed, saturation -15% global — forbid magenta tint, forbid orange warmth, forbid teal skin on shadows, forbid vintage fade. Locked-off or slow linear track; no handheld. Lip-synced, delivers: "Spacecraft like NASA's Magnetospheric Multiscale mission sample the real magnetosphere at multiple points — turning invisible fields into measured vectors we can plot." clear enthusiastic science communicator voice, precise but accessible diction, synthetic presenter only. Finish on presentational gesture peak, never hold dead stillness or dead frame.
shots.speech_text: Spacecraft like NASA's Magnetospheric Multiscale mission sample the real magnetosphere at multiple points — turning invisible fields into measured vectors we can plot.

shots.speech_text: Watch the payoff: closed loops threading from pole to pole around Earth — illustrative topology, not a photograph, but faithful to how measured fields are drawn.
